port.title: Port
port.description: [Optional] Port for bulbs to connect to your server.

enableScenes.title: Enable Scenes
enableScenes.description: [Optional] Turn on support for scenes with your lightbulbs. THIS WILL MAKE IT IMPOSSIBLE TO GROUP LIGHTS

lastStatus.title: Last Status
lastStatus.description: [Optional] Lights will remember the last mode used when turned on (light settings in HomeKit will be ignored).

broadcast.title: Broadcast Address
broadcast.description: [Optional] UDP Broadcast address for device discovery.

refreshInterval.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refreshInterval.description: [Optional] Ping every known device on this interval to keep state in sync. Specify in seconds, 0 = off.

discoveryInterval.title: Discovery Interval (seconds)
discoveryInterval.description: [Optional] Re-broadcast discovery periodically to detect devices added after startup. Specify in seconds, 0 = off.

pingFailuresBeforeOffline.title: Ping Failures Before Offline
pingFailuresBeforeOffline.description: [Optional] Number of consecutive missed pings before a device is marked as 'No Response' in Apple Home. Requires Refresh Interval > 0.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: [Optional] Manual list of IP addresses of bulbs
